name: 【システム】04_61-分析-ダッシュボード集計API_V5

parameters.query: SELECT metric_type, metric_date, metric_data FROM dashboard_metrics WHERE metric_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' ORDER BY metric_date DESC
SELECT * FROM dashboard_alerts WHERE is_read = false ORDER BY CASE alert_severity WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'warning' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, created_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT DATE(created_at) as sale_date, COUNT(*) as order_count, SUM(total_amount) as total_sales, SUM(CASE WHEN platform = 'ebay' THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) as ebay_sales, SUM(CASE WHEN platform = 'amazon' THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) as amazon_sales, SUM(CASE WHEN platform = 'shopee' THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) as shopee_sales, SUM(CASE WHEN platform = 'coupang' THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) as coupang_sales FROM orders_unified WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY sale_date DESC

SELECT platform, COUNT(*) as order_count, SUM(total_amount) as total_sales, AVG(total_amount) as avg_order_value FROM orders_unified WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY platform ORDER BY total_sales DESC

SELECT DATE(settled_at) as settle_date, COUNT(*) as settlements, SUM(gross_revenue) as total_revenue, SUM(net_profit) as total_profit, AVG(profit_margin) as avg_margin FROM profit_settlements WHERE settled_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY DATE(settled_at) ORDER BY settle_date DESC

SELECT pm.category_primary as category, COUNT(pm.id) as product_count, SUM(im.quantity) as total_stock, AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM NOW() - pm.created_at)) as avg_days_listed FROM products_master pm LEFT JOIN inventory_master im ON pm.id = im.product_id WHERE pm.status = 'active' GROUP BY pm.category_primary ORDER BY total_stock DESC LIMIT 20

INSERT INTO dashboard_metrics (metric_type, metric_date, metric_data) VALUES ($1, $2::date, $3::jsonb) ON CONFLICT (user_id, metric_type, metric_date) DO UPDATE SET metric_data = $3::jsonb, calculated_at = NOW() RETURNING id
SELECT setting_value::decimal FROM global_settings WHERE setting_key = 'alert_profit_drop_threshold'
INSERT INTO dashboard_alerts (alert_type, alert_severity, alert_title, alert_message, alert_data) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb) RETURNING id
